ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the data collection */,
  "daily_rainfall" REAL /* Daily rainfall in millimeters */,
  "temp_mean" REAL /* Mean temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of data being collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., City, State, Country) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  "data_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific data record */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection event */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collector who collected the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data collection (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of data being logged */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for data collection */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional comments or remarks about the data collection event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the collector */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collector (e.g., meteorologist, technician) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the collector */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the collector */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* Last login time of the collector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, MD) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a weather data record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for creating the version (e.g., bug fix, data correction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
